n: The Gambit at the Highest House

steps.t: Hórin is waiting for you at the gate of Uzdarulzahar. You should talk to Hórin.
The Battle of Uzdarulzahar has begun! You should complete objectives in Uzdarulzahar and find and assist your dwarf allies.
Hórin needs your assistance defeating Hárkyrta the Frigid in Uzdarulzahar. This will be a difficult fight! Use the battle horn at the gate of Uzdarulz…
The drake has been slain! You should talk to Hórin. Use the battle horn at the gate of Uzdarulzahar to summon the scout trio if they have left your si…
The battle has been won! You should return to Fellgát and talk to Hórin.
